debug_info.goal:
case neg.inl.fstE
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
err✝ callee✝ : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t :
  Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.fstE n a err✝ callee✝ :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

-- If b = a, then by stubbornness S a = T a.
                have : S b = T b := by

                  rcases eq_or_ne b callee✝ with hbc | hbc <;>

                  -- This follows from the assumptions: same role, same contribSet for callee, same pair.

-- More precisely, using `know_self` lemma:
